steps.title: Represent the width
steps.content: The length is $x$ inches, and it is $26$ inches longer than the width. Therefore, the width is $x-26$ inches.

steps.title: Use the area formula
steps.content:
Area equals length times width, so the sign's area gives
$$x(x-26)=2{,}535$$
Expanding and moving all terms to one side gives
$$x^2-26x-2{,}535=0$$

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content:
This is the same as
$$0=x^2-26x-2{,}535$$
The answer is A.
